allow: PowerShell(Start-Sleep -Seconds 5; try { $r = Invoke-WebRequest -Uri "http://127.0.0.1:8000/api/pd/metrics" -UseBasicParsing -TimeoutSec 5; "Backend status: $\($r.StatusCode\)" } catch { "Backend not reachable: $_" })
PowerShell(Get-Process | Where-Object { $_.Name -eq "python" -or $_.Name -eq "uvicorn" } | Stop-Process -Force -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; Write-Host "Killed old python processes")

PowerShell(Start-Sleep -Seconds 6; try { $r = Invoke-WebRequest -Uri "http://127.0.0.1:8000/api/pd/metrics" -UseBasicParsing -TimeoutSec 5; "Backend OK: $\($r.StatusCode\)" } catch { "Backend error: $_" }; Get-Content "c:\\Users\\MARLOS\\Downloads\\KURYOS\\backend_local.err.log" -Tail 10)

PowerShell($env:BROWSER = "none"; $env:PORT = "3000"; $proc = Start-Process -FilePath "cmd" -ArgumentList "/c", "cd /d c:\\Users\\MARLOS\\Downloads\\KURYOS\\frontend && set BROWSER=none && set PORT=3000 && node_modules\\.bin\\craco.cmd start" -WorkingDirectory "c:\\Users\\MARLOS\\Downloads\\KURYOS\\frontend" -RedirectStandardOutput "c:\\Users\\MARLOS\\Downloads\\KURYOS\\frontend_dev.out.log" -RedirectStandardError "c:\\Users\\MARLOS\\Downloads\\KURYOS\\frontend_dev.err.log" -PassThru -WindowStyle Hidden; Write-Host "Frontend PID: $\($proc.Id\)")

PowerShell($body = '{"email":"admin@kuryos.com","password":"admin123"}'; $r = Invoke-WebRequest -Uri "http://127.0.0.1:8000/api/auth/login" -Method POST -Body $body -ContentType "application/json" -UseBasicParsing -TimeoutSec 10; $r.StatusCode; $r.Content | ConvertFrom-Json | Select-Object -Property access_token, user)

PowerShell($body = '{"email":"admin@kuryos.com","password":"admin123"}'; $r = Invoke-WebRequest -Uri "http://127.0.0.1:8000/api/auth/login" -Method POST -Body $body -ContentType "application/json" -UseBasicParsing -TimeoutSec 10; $data = $r.Content | ConvertFrom-Json; $token = $data.access_token; Write-Host "Token obtained: $\($token.Substring\(0,20\)\)..."; $token | Out-File "c:\\Users\\MARLOS\\Downloads\\KURYOS\\test_token.txt" -Encoding utf8)
PowerShell(Get-Process | Where-Object { $_.Name -eq "node" } | Select-Object Id, Name, CPU | Format-Table)

PowerShell($proc = Start-Process -FilePath "cmd" -ArgumentList "/c", "set BROWSER=none && set PORT=3000 && node_modules\\.bin\\craco.cmd start > ..\\frontend_dev.out.log 2>&1" -WorkingDirectory "c:\\Users\\MARLOS\\Downloads\\KURYOS\\frontend" -PassThru -WindowStyle Normal; Write-Host "Frontend PID: $\($proc.Id\)")

PowerShell($proc = Start-Process -FilePath "cmd" -ArgumentList "/c", "set BROWSER=none && set PORT=3000 && node_modules\\.bin\\craco.cmd start > ..\\frontend_dev.out.log 2>&1" -WorkingDirectory "c:\\Users\\MARLOS\\Downloads\\KURYOS\\frontend" -PassThru -WindowStyle Hidden; Write-Host "Frontend PID: $\($proc.Id\)")
